name: Bona Fide Dispute Withholding Suspension

eligibility.description: Payees who have a legitimate legal or factual disagreement with the IRS's determination of underreported interest or dividends.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can stop backup withholding by demonstrating a bona fide dispute exists regarding whether there was actually any underreporting of income.
